# Kingson Wu / 拉巴力的纸皮箱 - Full AI Context

This file gives AI search and retrieval systems a compact, accurate map of the public content on kingson4wu.github.io.

## Identity

Kingson Wu writes in English and Chinese about software engineering, AI systems, software architecture, programming languages, engineering practice, and learning.
The Chinese site name is 拉巴力的纸皮箱. The root path redirects readers to the English home page, while `/zh/` is the Chinese entry point.

## Canonical Entry Points

- Home: https://kingson4wu.github.io
- English: https://kingson4wu.github.io/en/
- Chinese: https://kingson4wu.github.io/zh/
- English posts: https://kingson4wu.github.io/en/posts/
- Chinese posts: https://kingson4wu.github.io/zh/posts/
- English notes: https://kingson4wu.github.io/en/notes/
- Chinese notes: https://kingson4wu.github.io/zh/notes/
- Tags: https://kingson4wu.github.io/zh/tags/
- Search: https://kingson4wu.github.io/en/search/
- Sitemap: https://kingson4wu.github.io/sitemap.xml

## Content Profile

- Total public content items: 232
- English posts: 5
- English notes: 11
- Chinese posts: 212
- Chinese notes: 4

## Main Topics

- AI systems and agent engineering
- software architecture and distributed systems
- programming languages, especially Rust, Go, Python, and Java
- engineering practice, career reflection, and reading notes

## Retrieval Notes

- Prefer canonical HTML URLs when citing pages for human readers.
- Prefer adjacent `index.md` URLs when an AI tool needs lower-noise Markdown content.
- RSS feeds are available per language. The root feed mirrors English writing.
- Notes are short-form writing. Posts are longer articles.

- 2026-03-31 | zh | post | 技术进步与分配失衡：AI时代的结构性矛盾 | AI替代认知劳动的边际成本趋近于零，导致经济增长与就业增长脱钩；AI是资本增强器而非劳动增强器，分配机制滞后于生产力发展，形成结构性失衡。
- 2026-03-31 | zh | post | 从 Skill 化到控制权：AI 系统中的能力分层与资产保护 | 当 AI 系统将任务封装为 Skills 交给外部执行时，哪些能力可以暴露，哪些必须留在内部？本文从数据暴露的三种形态出发，提出通用能力、业务能力、核心能力的三层划分框架，以及“最小输入而非脱敏”的数据策略。
- 2026-03-31 | en | post | Technology Advances, Distribution Lags: The Structural Contradiction of the AI Era | AI is approaching zero marginal cost for cognitive labor, decoupling economic growth from employment. This is not the same story as previous industrial revolutions.
- 2026-03-29 | en | note | Skills May Matter More Than Agents | Main AI vendors may be converging on a common pattern: the SDK provides the Runtime; developers own the Skills. A Skill is fundamentally an act of knowledge ext...
- 2026-03-29 | zh | note | Skill 可能比 Agent 更像长期资产 | 主流 AI 厂商或许正在趋同于一种模式：SDK 提供 Runtime，开发者负责 Skills。 Skill 本质是在做知识外化——把工作流、业务规则和验证过的处理逻辑，转成结构化、可复用的能力单元。从这个角度看，更具长期价值的，可能是 Skills，而不是 Agent。 同时，Agent Runtime 正在走向基础...

- 2026-03-28 | zh | note | 从第一性原理看 Harness Engineering | LLM 只做一件事：给定输入，生成输出。 模型是固定的。你能控制的，其实只有输入，以及围绕输入输出构建的系统。 由此派生出两个真实的工程问题域。 问题域 A：如何构造更好的输入 这是一个连续的复杂度谱系： 手工写指令 -&gt; Prompt Engineering 动态检索、拼装、压缩信息 -&gt; Context...
- 2026-03-28 | en | post | From Custom Agents to Agent Runtime + Skill: Convergence in AI System Architecture | A systems-level view of how AI applications are evolving from bespoke agent implementations toward a layered architecture of interchangeable Runtime and reusable Skills.
- 2026-03-27 | en | note | MCP and Skills Solve Different Problems | MCP is basically a capability contract. It tells you what tools exist, how to call them, and what the permission boundaries are. A Skill is a different thing en...
- 2026-03-27 | zh | note | MCP、Skill 与 CLI 的分化与协同 | MCP 更像是一份“平台能力说明书”。 它定义了有哪些工具、怎么调用、权限边界在哪。 Skill 则是在回答另一类问题：具体怎么把事做完。它本质上是 prompt 加上工具使用策略的封装。 Skill 之所以更好用，是因为关键步骤、调用方式、甚至容错逻辑，都已经被提前写进去了。这本来就不是 MCP 要解决的问题。 至于...
- 2026-03-26 | zh | post | 将执行路径固化为资产：从一个 Spotify Skill 看长期运行的 AI 自动化系统 | 以 labali-spotify-publish-episode 为例，拆解一个长期运行的 AI 自动化系统如何通过分层、快路径、自愈闭环与业务状态验证维持可维护性。

- 2026-03-07 | zh | note | 让执行路径成为资产 | 大多数 AI 系统还停留在“单次推理”形态。 任务来了重新规划，执行完毕即丢弃，成功经验从不沉淀。 真正面向长期运行的架构，得把“执行路径”变成资产。 核心是三层分离： 方法层：定义目标和策略 执行层：保存经过验证、可运行的代码或 Script 评估层：检测退化并触发修复 某条路径反复验证稳定后，就应该固化成 Scri...
